footer.description: Crafted with passion and code by Steveen Cues.

welcome.title: Welcome to my portfolio
welcome.subtitle: Hi, I'm Steveen Ordoñez
welcome.description: Software Engineer & Tech Enthusiast. I specialize in bridging the gap between complex technical requirements and intuitive user experiences. With a background in Software Engineering and a deep passion for Data Science and DevOps, I build scalable, high-impact digital products. My approach combines clean architecture, creative problem-solving, and a focus on delivering measurable results.

jetmind.title: Jetmind Corporation
jetmind.description: Led the development of high-performance web and mobile applications using React, React Native, and Angular. Integrated cloud solutions with AWS and optimized backend processes using Laravel. Focused on delivering production-ready features under agile methodologies, ensuring scalability and seamless user interfaces.

madjs.title: MAD‑JS (Co-Founder)
madjs.description: Co-founded a software boutique focused on tailored digital solutions. I lead the full-stack architecture and DevOps strategies, implementing CI/CD pipelines to accelerate delivery cycles. My role involves transforming business ideas into robust technical products while mentoring the team on best practices.

manticorelabs.title: Manticore Labs
manticorelabs.description: Full-stack developer focused on microservices architectures using Angular and NestJS. Contributed to the quality assurance and development of key platforms like Bago and Mundo Venus, ensuring high standards of performance and code reliability in a fast-paced environment.

tcs.title: TCS Consultancy Service
tcs.description: Developed enterprise-level applications using .NET and Angular with a focus on Hexagonal Architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD). Leveraged Azure cloud services and modern UI frameworks like Tailwind CSS and PrimeNG to build modular and maintainable systems under Scrum frameworks.

portfolio.name: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: A high-end showcase of my work, built with a focus on performance, OKLCH color spaces, and responsive design patterns.

neuroniando.name: Neuroniando App
neuroniando.description: An interactive educational platform designed to enhance learning through gamification. Managed the full lifecycle from frontend development to Google Play Store deployment, including automated DevOps workflows.

neuroniandoWeb.name: Neuroniando Ecosystem
neuroniandoWeb.description: A comprehensive landing page built with React and AWS, designed to support the educational app with high availability and optimized SEO.

pichinchaBank.name: Banking Fintech Sandbox
pichinchaBank.description: An internal validation environment for Banco Pichincha. Implemented rigorous unit testing and security protocols to simulate real-world banking transactions using sandbox APIs.

travelEcuador.name: Ecuador Travel Portal
travelEcuador.description: Official project for the Ecuador Travel Fair in collaboration with the Ministry of Tourism. Delivered a high-traffic, visually stunning solution to promote national tourism.

southAmericanBank.name: Banking Interface Concept
southAmericanBank.description: A pixel-perfect UI/UX prototype for Banco Sudamericano, focusing on accessibility and modern CSS standards.

linkage.name: Institutional Management System
linkage.description: A document management solution for Instituto Yavirac. Built with Angular and PrimeNG, it streamlined administrative workflows through an intuitive dashboard and scalable architecture.

docsUnibe.name: Unibe Cloud Docs
docsUnibe.description: Enterprise document management system featuring AWS infrastructure. Conducted extensive stress testing and performance tuning to ensure stability during peak usage.

ing.title: Ibero-American University of Ecuador
ing.description: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering: Advanced training in system architecture, agile management, and full-stack development.

maestria.title: Ibero-American University of Ecuador
maestria.description: Master in Data Science and Big Data: Specialized in predictive analytics, machine learning, and data-driven decision making.

maestria_devops.title: UNIR - Universidad en Internet
maestria_devops.description: Master in Software Development and Operations (DevOps): Expertise in automation, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and cloud security.

tec.title: Yavirac Institute of Technology
tec.description: Associate Degree in Software Development: Fundamental training in database management and agile programming.

angular_complete.title: Professional Certifications
angular_complete.description: Angular Masterclass: Advanced state management, RxJS, and performance optimization.

csharp_oop.title: Professional Certifications
csharp_oop.description: Mastering Object-Oriented Programming with C# and .NET Core.

devops_ci_cd.title: Professional Certifications
devops_ci_cd.description: DevOps Engineering: Automation, Jenkins, Docker, and Kubernetes pipelines.

aws_solutions.title: Professional Certifications
aws_solutions.description: AWS Certified Solutions Architect: Cloud infrastructure design and cost optimization.
